# copick setup mcp-status

*Check Copick MCP server configuration status.*

## Usage

```bash
copick setup mcp-status [OPTIONS]
```

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--target` | choice (desktop \| code-global \| code-project) | `desktop` | Target application to check status for |
| `--project-path` | directory | — | Project path for code-project target (defaults to current directory) |
